markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content strategy for Exec and Smith clients.](https://fathom.video/share/SpZScsAsrNKDPgX_AUVCvJGgPei73XsG?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Exec Comparison Posts:** Create a feature matrix from deep research (Perplexity, Fathom calls) to build credible, source-cited posts. Usman must share the template with Jo for review *before* drafting.](https://fathom.video/share/SpZScsAsrNKDPgX_AUVCvJGgPei73XsG?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [**Smith Content:** Prioritize accuracy and tone for this detail-oriented client. Use the "Call Flow Design Hub guidelines" in Claude and the "Smith SEO" GPT to ensure the correct educational, non-promotional style.](https://fathom.video/share/SpZScsAsrNKDPgX_AUVCvJGgPei73XsG?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [**Workflow & Process:** Usman must immediately clarify the correct versions of Smith's "Call Flow Design" articles for Jo's review and adopt a "one tab, one version" rule to eliminate confusion.](https://fathom.video/share/SpZScsAsrNKDPgX_AUVCvJGgPei73XsG?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)

## Topics

### Smith Content Strategy

  - [**Challenge:** Smith is a highly detail-oriented client (Madi) who flags minor issues (e.g., formatting, font) as major problems, creating significant review friction.](https://fathom.video/share/SpZScsAsrNKDPgX_AUVCvJGgPei73XsG?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [**Solution:** Proactively derisk the process by ensuring all content is perfect before submission.](https://fathom.video/share/SpZScsAsrNKDPgX_AUVCvJGgPei73XsG?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [**Tone:** Must be educational and non-promotional.](https://fathom.video/share/SpZScsAsrNKDPgX_AUVCvJGgPei73XsG?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
          - [**Tool:** Use the "Call Flow Design Hub guidelines" in Claude or the "Smith SEO" GPT to check for the correct tone.](https://fathom.video/share/SpZScsAsrNKDPgX_AUVCvJGgPei73XsG?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
          - [**Process:** Analyze the last 5 customer calls with ChatGPT to understand specific expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/SpZScsAsrNKDPgX_AUVCvJGgPei73XsG?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
      - [**Accuracy:** Verify all facts and stats, especially in external links.](https://fathom.video/share/SpZScsAsrNKDPgX_AUVCvJGgPei73XsG?tab=summary&timestamp=1199.0)
      - [**Style:** Adhere strictly to the style guide (e.g., correct m-dash spacing).](https://fathom.video/share/SpZScsAsrNKDPgX_AUVCvJGgPei73XsG?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
      - [**Internal Linking:** Ensure anchor text is precise.](https://fathom.video/share/SpZScsAsrNKDPgX_AUVCvJGgPei73XsG?tab=summary&timestamp=1180.0)
  - [**Priority:** The "Call Flow Design" cluster is the top priority.](https://fathom.video/share/SpZScsAsrNKDPgX_AUVCvJGgPei73XsG?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
  - [**New Pipeline:** A new pipeline is needed to enrich high-performing industry pages (e.g., legal) that Madi wants to deepen. Usman will create a ticket for this.](https://fathom.video/share/SpZScsAsrNKDPgX_AUVCvJGgPei73XsG?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)

### Exec Comparison Posts Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Create templated editorial posts comparing Exec to competitors (e.g., Second Nature).](https://fathom.video/share/SpZScsAsrNKDPgX_AUVCvJGgPei73XsG?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [**Research Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/SpZScsAsrNKDPgX_AUVCvJGgPei73XsG?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
    1.  [**Review Messaging Doc:** Read the new Exec messaging doc to understand key differentiators.](https://fathom.video/share/SpZScsAsrNKDPgX_AUVCvJGgPei73XsG?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
    2.  **Build Feature Matrix:** Use Perplexity/ChatGPT for deep research on all platforms.
          - [**Output:** A table comparing features across all competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/SpZScsAsrNKDPgX_AUVCvJGgPei73XsG?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
          - [**Requirement:** Cite all sources to prevent hallucinations.](https://fathom.video/share/SpZScsAsrNKDPgX_AUVCvJGgPei73XsG?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
    3.  [**Analyze Customer Calls:** Use Fathom to summarize the last 3 Exec calls, focusing on competitor discussions.](https://fathom.video/share/SpZScsAsrNKDPgX_AUVCvJGgPei73XsG?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [**Positioning:**](https://fathom.video/share/SpZScsAsrNKDPgX_AUVCvJGgPei73XsG?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
      - [**Exec's Strength:** Unmatched customization for enterprise-level role-plays.](https://fathom.video/share/SpZScsAsrNKDPgX_AUVCvJGgPei73XsG?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
      - [**Competitor's Strength:** Often cheaper tools for smaller businesses.](https://fathom.video/share/SpZScsAsrNKDPgX_AUVCvJGgPei73XsG?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Frame the comparison around market focus (enterprise vs. SMB) to highlight Exec's value.](https://fathom.video/share/SpZScsAsrNKDPgX_AUVCvJGgPei73XsG?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [**Template & Assets:**](https://fathom.video/share/SpZScsAsrNKDPgX_AUVCvJGgPei73XsG?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
      - [**Template:** Usman must share the draft template with Jo for review *before* writing.](https://fathom.video/share/SpZScsAsrNKDPgX_AUVCvJGgPei73XsG?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
      - [**Assets:** Request a "screenshot pack" and customer quotes from Garrett.](https://fathom.video/share/SpZScsAsrNKDPgX_AUVCvJGgPei73XsG?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)

### Workflow & Process Improvements

  - [**"One Tab, One Version" Rule:** To eliminate confusion, each Google Doc must contain only the final, approved version of an article. Old versions must be moved to a separate storage location (e.g., Mac Notes).](https://fathom.video/share/SpZScsAsrNKDPgX_AUVCvJGgPei73XsG?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
  - [**Ticket Analysis Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/SpZScsAsrNKDPgX_AUVCvJGgPei73XsG?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
      - [**Action:** For any ticket with a "call for context" link, analyze the transcript with ChatGPT to extract all necessary information before starting work.](https://fathom.video/share/SpZScsAsrNKDPgX_AUVCvJGgPei73XsG?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Usman:**](https://fathom.video/share/SpZScsAsrNKDPgX_AUVCvJGgPei73XsG?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
      - [Clarify correct versions of Smith's "Call Flow Design" articles for Jo's review.](https://fathom.video/share/SpZScsAsrNKDPgX_AUVCvJGgPei73XsG?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
      - [Share the Exec comparison post template with Jo for review.](https://fathom.video/share/SpZScsAsrNKDPgX_AUVCvJGgPei73XsG?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
      - [Request Exec screenshots and quotes from Garrett.](https://fathom.video/share/SpZScsAsrNKDPgX_AUVCvJGgPei73XsG?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
      - [Create a Linear ticket for the new Smith industry page refresh pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/SpZScsAsrNKDPgX_AUVCvJGgPei73XsG?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
      - [Adopt the "one tab, one version" workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/SpZScsAsrNKDPgX_AUVCvJGgPei73XsG?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
  - [**Jo:**](https://fathom.video/share/SpZScsAsrNKDPgX_AUVCvJGgPei73XsG?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)
      - [Review Smith's "Call Flow Design" articles and send to the customer today.](https://fathom.video/share/SpZScsAsrNKDPgX_AUVCvJGgPei73XsG?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)
